title: Textarea Character Counter

statement.markdown:
## Textarea Character Counter & Limit

Create a textarea input field with a dynamic character counter that alerts the user when they exceed a limit of 100 characters.

### Requirements:
1. **Dynamic Character Counter**: Track input length in real-time and display it in the format `X / 100` (e.g., `45 / 100`).
2. **Visual Warning Threshold**: When the count exceeds 100, update the text color of the counter label to red (`text-red-500`) and add a red border (`border-red-500`) to the textarea. When it is within limits, restore normal border styles.
3. **Event Listeners**: Listen to inputs in the textarea to update states instantly.

constraints: Must use the 'input' event listener to track keystrokes accurately
Must use standard Tailwind CSS utility classes

starterCode.html: 0 / 100

gradingCriteria.description: Verify character counter tracks length accurately, updates label format, and triggers red colors above 100 characters.
Verify use of input event instead of keydown, and clean classList class manipulation.
